name: openbpx
description: BPX Codex plugin for Unreal Engine asset inspection and safe edit workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and safely edit Unreal assets with bpx.
interface.longDescription: Use BPX command skills in Codex to inspect, validate, and make safety-constrained edits to Unreal .uasset and .umap files without launching Unreal Editor.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Unreal asset with bpx.
Plan a safe BPX edit workflow.
